title: Skyblock Optimized
description: An optimized modpack for Forge 1.8.9 designed to minimize lag and FPS drops in Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
# 🌟 Skyblock Optimized – The Ultimate Hypixel Skyblock Experience!
**Skyblock Optimized** is a carefully **curated** Forge 1.8.9 modpack designed to enhance performance, improve **quality of life**, and optimize gameplay for Hypixel Skyblock. Whether your running dungeons, mining or doing the rift, this modpack ensures a smooth and efficient experience without breaking Hypixel's rules.

# ✨ Features:
✅ **FPS Boost & Performance Enhancements** – Say goodbye to lag with mods that optimize rendering, memory usage, and client stability.

✅ **Skyblock QoL Mods** – Essential utilities for dungeons, farming, and general gameplay improvements.

✅ **Customizable HUD & UI Enhancements** – Stay informed with better overlays, timers, and status indicators.

✅ **Fair Play & Hypixel Compliant** – All included mods are allowed on Hypixel, ensuring a safe and ban-free experience.

✅ **Lightweight & Easy to Use** – No unnecessary bloat—just the best mods for a seamless Skyblock session.

# 📥 Download & Installation
1️⃣**Firstly** install Skyblock Optimized through the **Modrinth App**

2️⃣**Then** download Optifine off this link: [https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar)

3️⃣**Next**, tap on the three dots next to the **settings cog.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53a457d59b851dfdc606eaf27ea1a03e4d2bc392.png)

4️⃣Click on **Open folder.**

5️⃣Drag your **OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar** file, into your **mods folder**.
